metadata.notes: BIGGEST CALL OF THIS BUILD: bare 'Castro' (n=162, the largest single anchor available) is DELIBERATELY EXCLUDED. Of its 162 titles, 80 are the US legal case against Raul Castro (which belongs to cuba_embargo_sanctions, already anchored there by 'indict'/'imputa') and only 6 are legitimacy/reform. Including it would have made this atomic the theater's largest on entirely misfiled content. The legitimacy sense is carried by 'Diaz-Canel' (the sitting president) and es 'castrismo' (the succession/ideology sense) instead. Also dropped: 'exile'/'exilio' (samples dominated by the speedboat attack -> cuba_military_coercion), 'detention'/'detain' (US ICE-custody deaths, a US domestic immigration story, plus one patrol-boat arrest), 'crackdown' (both hits are US SANCTIONS crackdowns, not Cuban repression), 'activist' (mixed with aid convoys). de 'Reform' dropped as a pure Latin duplicate of en 'reform' (identical n=32 match set). Dropped for 0 hits: PCC, Politburo, National Assembly, single-party, succession, dissident(en), opposition(en), repression(en), censorship, UNPACU, Ladies in White, San Isidro, 11J, mipyme, cuentapropista, devaluation, state enterprise, legitimacy, referendum, election, Partido Comunista, Buro Politico, Asamblea Nacional, derechos humanos, censura, Damas de Blanco, sucesion, devaluacion.
